title: Nursery Rhyme. LVI. Tales.
content:
Little Tommy Tittlemouse
        Lived in a little house;
        He caught fishes
        In other men's ditches.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. LVI. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
